title: Clementoni - Crazy Chic Studio: Temporary Tattoo Kit for Kids with Stencils & Paints (6+ Years)
features: For tattoo lovers, a super cool kit to create incredible freehand or stencil tattoos! Two special tools to draw tattoos by hands or with adhesive stencils or interchangeable moulds
A console to get to work immediately with designs and techniques to create unique and super personalized tattoos
For each style a different technique and specific tools to achieve it, in order to leave children free to express their artistic skills with the utmost precision
Using the special body pen with 4 interchangeable coloured tips, girls can have fun creating their own personalised tattoos, drawing them by hand or using stencils

It contains a precision tool for printing modular icons with body paints, brushes, transfer tattoos, sponges, glitter and body glue, stencils and a tattoo book with drawings. Develops creativity and dexterity
description: Product Description For tattoo lovers, a super cool kit to create incredible freehand or stencil tattoos! Two special tools to draw tattoos by hands or with adhesive stencils or interchangeable moulds. A console to get to work immediately with designs and techniques to create unique and super personalized tattoos. For each style a different technique and specific tools to achieve it, in order to leave children free to express their artistic skills with the utmost precision. Using the special body pen with 4 interchangeable coloured tips, girls can have fun creating their own personalised tattoos, drawing them by hand or using stencils. It contains a precision tool for printing modular icons with body paints, brushes, transfer tattoos, sponges, glitter and body glue, stencils and a tattoo book with drawings. Develops creativity and dexterity. Directions Choose the pattern you prefer and personalize it with the color interchangeable tip marker or stencils, apply colors and glitter with sponges and brushes and add details and finishes to create a unique and creative tattoo. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years. For use under adult supervision See more
